character.description: compact colorful achievement badge icons for a cozy slime clicker game

click1.action: first click achievement badge, tiny smiling slime button with one tap sparkle painted on badge

click100.action: 100 clicks achievement badge, cute clapping glove pair around small slime coin

click1k.action: 1000 clicks achievement badge, energetic flame-shaped click medal

click10k.action: 10000 clicks achievement badge, strong golden fist medal with slime face

combo30.action: combo 30 achievement badge, yellow lightning rhythm badge

combo50.action: combo 50 achievement badge, blue spiral storm rhythm badge

chick10.action: 10 chicks achievement badge, tiny chick nest medal

chick50.action: 50 chicks achievement badge, proud chicken crown medal

cat25.action: 25 cats achievement badge, cute cat coin scholar medal

friend100.action: 100 friends achievement badge, cheerful circus tent friendship medal

star1.action: first golden star achievement badge, single bright star catch medal

star10.action: 10 golden stars achievement badge, radiant double star hunter medal

coin1e4.action: 10000 coins achievement badge, small coin pouch medal

coin1e6.action: one million coins achievement badge, blue diamond coin medal

coin1e8.action: one hundred million coins achievement badge, cute bank vault coin medal

coin1e10.action: ten billion coins achievement badge, cosmic galaxy coin medal

evo1.action: first evolution achievement badge, DNA slime droplet medal

evoMax.action: max evolution achievement badge, royal crown legendary slime medal

allUp.action: all upgrades achievement badge, trophy with tiny upgrade charms

rebirth1.action: first rebirth achievement badge, pink jelly blossom soul medal

rebirth3.action: three rebirths achievement badge, deep blue reincarnation swirl medal

style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution game sprite, compact chibi/mascot-friendly proportions when the base allows it, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, clear limbs, and no detail that disappears at small runtime size. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
